svg.title: PPO dataflow with a single trained actor and a trained critic
svg.desc: Diagram of Proximal Policy Optimization with two trained models: one actor policy network that both collects rollouts and receives gradient updates, and one critic value network that scores states and is trained. The environment, rollout buffer, Generalized Advantage Estimation, clipped surrogate loss, and value loss are shown, with feedback loops applying gradients to the actor and the critic.

g.text: s, a, r, log πold, V
